title: Top 5 Geopolitics Headlines

slides.headline: Tensions spike between US and Iran
slides.explanation: Donald Trump has issued a warning to Iran after a series of military strikes near the Strait of Hormuz. Both sides are accusing the other of breaking their ceasefire agreement.

slides.headline: Australian man charged in Thailand
slides.explanation: An Australian man is facing murder charges after the body of a 17-year-old girl was discovered in a suitcase near a railway track in Thailand.

slides.headline: Australia gets tougher on social media
slides.explanation: Australia is doubling the fines for social media companies that violate the country's ban on platforms for children under 16. This follows the ban that took effect in late 2025.

slides.headline: New warning for US migrants
slides.explanation: The US Homeland Security secretary is telling migrants on temporary status to apply for permanent residency or prepare to leave. This follows a recent Supreme Court ruling regarding protected status.

slides.headline: Gulf peace deal under pressure
slides.explanation: New fighting in the Gulf shows that the recent US-Iran peace agreement might have been unclear. The two sides seem to have different views on what the deal actually promised.

caption: Here are the biggest stories making headlines around the world today. From shifting policies in the US and Australia to rising tensions in the Middle East, we are keeping you updated on what matters. Check out the slides for the full breakdown. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.

title: Top 5 Things In Tech Today

slides.headline: A touchscreen MacBook is coming soon
slides.explanation: Reports say Apple plans to launch a touchscreen MacBook sooner than expected. It will likely run on the new M5 Pro and M5 Max chips.

slides.headline: China's new AI closes the gap
slides.explanation: Researchers say Zhipu AI's new model performs surprisingly well at cybersecurity tasks. It is starting to rival top models like Mythos for finding bugs.

slides.headline: Suno launches artist incubator
slides.explanation: The AI music platform Suno is starting a program to help independent musicians. It offers grants and support to unsigned artists who want to grow their careers.

slides.headline: The future of Tesla's self-driving
slides.explanation: All eyes are on Tesla's Full Self-Driving technology right now. It remains a key focus for anyone watching how AI is changing the future of transport.

slides.headline: Is Micron the next Nvidia?
slides.explanation: Wall Street investors are looking for the next big AI stock. Many are now betting that the memory chip maker Micron could see similar success to Nvidia.

caption: Here are the top tech stories you need to know today. From Apple's hardware updates to the latest in AI competition, we have you covered. Stay informed with Headlinne. Read more on HEADLINNE.com.
